desc.id: Titik nol sejarah tertulis Yogyakarta — deklarasi peradaban kepada kekekalan (732 M).
desc.en: Yogyakarta's written history point zero — a civilization's declaration to eternity (732 AD).

desc.id: Perlawanan gerilya lima tahun yang menguras kas Hindia Belanda hingga 20 juta Gulden.
desc.en: Five years of guerrilla resistance that drained 20 million guilders from the Dutch East Indies treasury.

desc.id: Enam jam yang membuktikan kepada PBB bahwa Republik Indonesia belum mati.
desc.en: Six hours proving to the UN that the Republic of Indonesia was not dead.

desc.id: Kongres pertama organisasi modern Indonesia digelar di Yogyakarta, Oktober 1908.
desc.en: The first congress of Indonesia's first modern organization held in Yogyakarta, October 1908.

desc.id: Universitas negeri pertama Indonesia didirikan di Yogyakarta, Desember 1949.
desc.en: Indonesia's first national university founded in Yogyakarta, December 1949.

desc.id: Seni pertunjukan delapan jam semalam suntuk dengan dalang sebagai sutradara 200 karakter.
desc.en: Eight-hour all-night performance art with the Dalang directing 200 characters.

desc.id: Motif larangan seperti Parang Rusak dan sistem kosmologi Jawa yang diukir di kain.
desc.en: Forbidden motifs like Parang Rusak and Javanese cosmology carved into cloth.

desc.id: Demokrasi suara berusia sepuluh abad: Kyai Gunturmadu berbunyi hanya sekali setahun.
desc.en: Ten-century democracy of sound: Kyai Gunturmadu plays only once a year.

desc.id: Festival seni kontemporer internasional tahunan dari komunitas seniman Yogyakarta.
desc.en: Annual international contemporary art festival from Yogyakarta's artist community.

desc.id: Biennale tertua di Indonesia sejak 1988, diakui kurator seni internasional.
desc.en: Indonesia's oldest biennial since 1988, recognized by international art curators.

desc.id: Nangka muda direbus dua belas jam di atas bara. Resep abdi dalem tidak berubah sejak 1755.
desc.en: Young jackfruit slow-cooked twelve hours over embers. A royal palace recipe unchanged since 1755.

desc.id: Kikil sapi ditumis dengan dua genggam cabai rawit. Pedasnya membuka lapisan rasa tersembunyi.
desc.en: Beef tendon stir-fried with two fistfuls of bird's-eye chili. Heat that unlocks hidden flavors.

desc.id: Daging kambing di atas jeruji sepeda besi. Hanya garam. Kepercayaan pada bahan baku.
desc.en: Mutton on iron bicycle spokes. Only salt. Total confidence in the raw ingredient.

desc.id: Satu porsi, satu wajan, satu arang. Buka setelah pukul delapan malam. Tutup saat bumbu habis.
desc.en: One portion, one wok, one coal. Opens after eight in the evening. Closes when the spices run out.

desc.id: Nasi sebesar kepalan tangan, seribu rupiah. Bangku panjang yang menyamakan semua orang.
desc.en: Rice the size of a fist, seven cents. A long bench where everyone is equal.

desc.id: Ketan bakar di kaki Merapi, 700 meter dpl. Empat dekade resep yang tidak berubah.
desc.en: Grilled glutinous rice at Merapi's foothills, 700m elevation. Four decades, one unchanged recipe.

desc.id: Mie singkong dari Bantul, digiling mesin enam puluh tahun. 'Lethek' berarti tidak ada yang disembunyikan.
desc.en: Cassava noodles from Bantul, rolled through a sixty-year-old machine. 'Lethek' means nothing is hidden.

desc.id: Berdiri 1921. Kaldu bening ayam kampung semalam tanpa MSG. Seratus tahun tanpa mengubah resep.
desc.en: Established 1921. Clear free-range chicken broth, overnight, no MSG. A century without changing the recipe.

desc.id: Tepung singkong kukus dari tanah berbatu. Bukan makanan kemiskinan — kecerdasan adaptasi manusia.
desc.en: Steamed cassava flour from rocky land. Not poverty food — the intelligent adaptation of a people.

desc.id: Tiga menara 47 meter tanpa semen. Dibangun 856 M, masih berdiri lebih dari seribu tahun kemudian.
desc.en: Three 47-meter towers built without cement in 856 AD, still standing over a thousand years later.

desc.id: Garis kosmologis dua kilometer yang menghubungkan api Merapi ke selatan laut.
desc.en: A two-kilometer cosmological line connecting Merapi's fire to the southern sea.

desc.id: Stratovolcano paling aktif Indonesia. Bagi warga Jogja, bukan ancaman — melainkan leluhur.
desc.en: Indonesia's most active stratovolcano. For Yogyanese, not a threat — but an ancestor.

desc.id: Resor pegunungan bersejarah di lereng selatan Merapi. Titik start pendakian dan sarapan jadah tempe.
desc.en: Historic mountain resort on Merapi's southern slopes. Starting point for hikes and jadah tempe breakfast.

desc.id: Makam Panembahan Senopati, Masjid Mataram 1640, dan pengrajin perak empat generasi di gang sempit.
desc.en: Tomb of Panembahan Senopati, 1640 Mataram Mosque, and four-generation silver craftsmen in narrow lanes.

desc.id: Museum terbaik di Jawa. Menyimpan sejarah perempuan bangsawan Mataram yang tidak masuk buku sejarah.
desc.en: Java's finest museum. Holding the history of Mataram royal women who never made it into history books.

desc.id: Tebing tambang yang berubah menjadi panggung. Relief mitologi Jawa dipahat seniman lokal 2015–2020.
desc.en: A quarry cliff transformed into a stage. Javanese mythological reliefs carved by local artists 2015–2020.

desc.id: Pasar sejak Mataram pertama berdiri. Bukan objek wisata — ini kota yang sedang bekerja.
desc.en: A market since Mataram was first built. Not a tourist attraction — this is a city at work.

desc.id: 300+ startup aktif di koridor Ringroad Utara. Efisiensi modal yang tidak bisa ditandingi Jakarta.
desc.en: 300+ active startups along the North Ringroad corridor. Capital efficiency Jakarta cannot match.

desc.id: 200+ layanan publik digital, sensor IoT mitigasi Merapi, dan tata kelola data presisi.
desc.en: 200+ digitized public services, Merapi IoT mitigation sensors, and precision data governance.

desc.id: 60% UMKM Yogyakarta kini di platform digital. Pengrajin Kotagede menjual ke Eropa dari ponsel.
desc.en: 60% of Yogyakarta SMEs now on digital platforms. Kotagede craftsmen selling to Europe from their phones.

desc.id: 21 perguruan tinggi, puluhan ribu lulusan STEM per tahun, 24/7 ritme akademik dan komunitas.
desc.en: 21 universities, tens of thousands of STEM graduates per year, 24/7 academic and community rhythm.

desc.id: UGM (top 300 dunia), UNY, UII, UMY, Sanata Dharma, dan Atma Jaya Yogyakarta.
desc.en: UGM (world top 300), UNY, UII, UMY, Sanata Dharma, and Atma Jaya Yogyakarta.

desc.id: Rambat Coffee, Grhatama Pustaka, Internet Learning Cafe, dan Ruang JAKA — fokus tanpa kompromi.
desc.en: Rambat Coffee, Grhatama Pustaka, Internet Learning Cafe, and Ruang JAKA — focus without compromise.
